hero.tagline: We nailed it. Never opened the manual.
hero.heading: Motion, 3D, branding and design, all in the same key.
hero.subtitle: No manual: we go by instinct and feeling until it clicks.

about.title: About us
about.p1: We skip the manual. We build harmony: motion, 3D, branding and design rowing the same way until it clicks.
about.p2: Less instruction manual, more gut feeling. If it works, it works — the nice explanation comes later.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: Motion, 3D, branding, design and web. No manuals were harmed.
portfolio.pending: Doesn't exist yet. Nobody read a manual to rush it.
